rulings.Case Title: MATTIE MCFALL et al VS. ARVIN MERITOR, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Quash Deposition Notices For Plaintiffs And, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order To Prohibit The Deposition Of Any Plaintiff Until Plaintiffs Provide Required Discovery
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MARCH 17, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. Defendants Bentley Motors, Inc.¿s, Mercedes-Benz USA¿s, and Volkswagen Group of America¿s motion to quash deposition notices for plaintiffs and, in the alternative, for a protective order to prohibit the deposition of any plaintiff until plaintiffs provide required discovery is continued on the court¿s own motion to March 25 at 1:30 pm in Department 611, Hon. James J. McBride presiding. Plaintiffs must submit a courtesy copy of their opposition papers to Department 220 as soon as possible. = (220/HEK)
